checks.description: Smoke test: Gemini usage service tests pass, proving the service can normalize successful quota responses and sanitized error states without live credentials.
checks.notes: `xcodebuild test ... -only-testing:PinemeterTests/GeminiUsageServiceTests` exited 0; no live Gemini credentials were required.

checks.description: Credential boundary remains secure: SecurityInvariantTests and GeminiCredentialBoundaryTests pass and Gemini API-key material is stored only through the Gemini Keychain repository boundary.

evidence.note: Static secret scan passed for AppSettings and production logging.

checks.notes: Focused security tests passed, and the static scan found no Gemini credential-like AppSettings persistence fields or production logging statements.

checks.description: Usage service normalizes Gemini outcomes: success, auth failure, quota unavailable, and network failure map to normalized usage or sanitized failure categories.

evidence.note: Test source coverage inspection passed for usage outcome signals.

checks.notes: Runtime tests passed; source inspection confirmed coverage signals for success, auth failure, quota unavailable/missing quota, network failure, and sanitized diagnostics.

checks.description: AppModel exposes Gemini state without credential material: credential availability drives configured state, refresh behavior, and clear behavior.

evidence.note: Test source coverage inspection passed for AppModel Gemini configured/refresh/clear signals.

checks.notes: AppModelTests passed; source inspection confirmed Gemini configuration, refresh, and clear behavior signals.

checks.description: Edge case: valid Gemini response lacking quota fields is treated as quotaUnavailable with sanitized diagnostics rather than an unknown error.

evidence.note: Source inspection found quota-unavailable/missing-quota coverage signals.

checks.notes: The focused service test suite passed and source inspection confirmed quota-unavailable/missing-quota coverage signals.

checks.description: Edge case: clearing Gemini removes stored credential availability and resets usage/configuration state without broad credential deletion outside the Gemini repository boundary.

evidence.note: Source inspection found AppModel Gemini clear coverage signals.

checks.notes: AppModel and credential boundary tests passed; source inspection confirmed clear-path coverage signals.

notes: All automatable runtime and artifact checks passed; an auxiliary stdout-label heuristic was inconclusive and was superseded by source coverage inspection plus passing focused xcodebuild suites.
